title: salix peraffinis
intro: Salix peraffinis, also known as the willow-leaved willow or Salix willow-leaved, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The medicinal properties of Salix peraffinis are attributed to its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, making it a natural anti-inflammatory and pain reliever. The health benefits of Salix peraffinis include reducing fever, relieving arthritis and other joint pains, and treating headaches and menstrual cramps. Salix peraffinis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
